series_metadata.series_description: Contains solicitor applications, and any other information pertaining to the solicitor. This is a bi-annual renewal.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Solicitor Applications are processed then scanned into LITS (License Issuance Tracking System) a computereized optical scanning Image System and continually updated. LITS images are stored forever and then saved to a (WORM) drive - write once, read many. These images are never purged. ; Paper: Paper files are kept for 6 months, Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Recycle
